{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Ruler construct
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Ruler construct]] in [[Kiro's armor]] pelts [[Lindon]] with projectiles.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
